awesomeList.descriptionHTML: Collection of awesome Python types, stubs, plugins, and tools to work with them.
awesomeList.description: Collection of awesome Python types, stubs, plugins, and tools to work with them.

nodes.itemHTML: • typing_utilsstars4 - Backport 3.8+ runtime typing utils(for eg: get_origin) & add issubtype & more.
• mypy-silentstars3 - Silence mypy by adding or removing code comments.
• com2annstars90 - Tool for translation of type comments to type annotations in Python.
• The state of type hints in Python - As of May 2018.
• flake8-typing-importsstars26 - Plugin which checks that typing imports are properly guarded.
• flake8-typing-only-importsstars13 - flake8 plugin that helps identify which imports to put into type-checking blocks, and how to adjust your type annotations once imports are moved.
• PyTest MonkeyType Introduction - Type Annotate an existing Python Django Codebase with MonkeyType.
• beartypestars250 - Unbearably fast O(1) runtime type-checking in pure Python.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • MonkeyTypestars3.4k - Collects runtime types of function arguments and return values, and can automatically generate stub files or even add draft type annotations directly to your Python code based on the types collected at runtime.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • pytest-monkeytypestars17 - MonkeyType plugin for pytest.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • pyannotatestars1.2k - Insert annotations into your source code based on call arguments and return types observed at runtime.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • pytest-annotatestars76 - Pyannotate plugin for pytest.
• typetstars17 - Length-bounded types, dynamic object validation.
• typing-json - Lib for working with typed objects and JSON.
• flake8-annotationsstars61 - Plugin for flake8 to check for presence of type annotations in function definitions.
• loguru-mypystars4 - Plugin for logurustars8.8k support.
• pytest-mypy-testingstars12 - Pytest plugin to test mypy static type analysis.
• pyanalyzestars122 - Extensible static analyzer and type checker for Python.
• pynamodb-mypystars1 - Plugin for PynamoDBstars1.6k support.
• PEP-3107 - Function Annotations.
• PEP-482 - Literature Overview for Type Hints.
• PEP-483 - The Theory of Type Hints.
• PEP-484 - Type Hints.
• PEP-526 - Syntax for Variable Annotations.
• PEP-544 - Protocols: Structural subtyping (static duck typing).
• PEP-557 - Data Classes.
• PEP-560 - Core support for typing module and generic types.
• PEP-561 - Distributing and Packaging Type Information.
• PEP-563 - Postponed Evaluation of Annotations.
• PEP-585 - Type Hinting Generics In Standard Collections.
• PEP-586 - Literal Types.
• PEP-589 - TypedDict: Type Hints for Dictionaries with a Fixed Set of Keys.
• PEP-591 - Adding a final qualifier to typing.
• PEP-593 - Flexible function and variable annotations.
• PEP-604 - Complementary syntax for Union[].
• PEP-612 - Parameter Specification Variables.
• PEP-613 - Explicit Type Aliases.
• typicalstars114 - Data parsing and automatic type-coercion using type hinting. Supports dataclasses, standard classes, function signatures, and more.
• typingplusstars6 - Backport support, dynamic is_instance and cast for abstract types.
• typing - Support for type hints.
• Backports and improvements
• typed-aststars183 - Modified fork of CPython's ast module that parses # type: comments.
• typing-extensions - Backported and experimental type hints.
• pytypesstars152 - Provides a rich set of utilities for runtime typechecking.
• typing_inspectstars202 - The typing_inspect module defines experimental API for runtime inspection of types defined in the Python standard typing module.
• Dynamic type checkers
• pydanticstars6.3k - Data parsing using Python type hinting. Supports dataclasses.
• typeguardstars640 - Another one runtime type checker.
• mypyc - Compiles mypy-annotated, statically typed Python modules into CPython C extensions.
• 1-minute guide to real constants in Python - Full tutorial about Final constants and inheritance.
• Simple dependent types in Python - Full tutorial about Literal types.
• mypystars10.6k - Optional static typing for Python 3 and 2 (PEP 484).
• pyre - Performant type-checker for Python 3.
• pytypestars3.3k - Tool to check and infer types for Python code - without requiring type annotations.
• PyCharm - IDE for Professional Developers.
• pyrightstars6.7k - Fast type checker meant for large Python source bases. It can run in a “watch” mode and performs fast incremental updates when files are modified.
• Typeshedstars2.1k - Collection of library stubs for Python, with static types.
• django-stubsstars646 - Stubs for Djangostars57.3k.
• djangorestframework-stubsstars203 - Stubs for DRFstars20.9k.
• wemake-python-styleguidestars1.5k - The strictest and most opinionated python linter ever.
• flake8-mypystars103 - Plugin for flake8 integrating mypy.
• flake8-pyistars22 - Plugin for Flake8 that provides specializations for type hinting stub files.
• flake8-annotations-complexitystars29 - Plugin for flake8 to validate annotations complexity.
• pytest-mypystars187 - Mypy static type checker plugin for Pytest.
• pytest-mypy-pluginsstars47 - Pytest plugin for testing mypy types, stubs, and plugins.
• merge_pyi - Part of pytype toolchain, applies stub files onto source code.
• retypestars99 - Another tool to apply stubs to code.
• mypy-protobufstars348 - Tool to generate mypy stubs from protobufs.
• mypy-zopestars30 - Plugin for zope.interface support.
• mypy/plugins - Plugins already integrated into mypy.
• mypy-PyCharm-pluginstars276 - Mypy integration for PyCharm.
• vim-mypystars82 - Mypy integration for Vim.
• linter-mypy - Mypy integration for Atom.
• emacs-flycheck-mypystars36 - Mypy integration for Emacs.
• MyPy docs - General information about stubs.
• Typechecking Django and DRF - Full tutorial about type-checking django.
• Testing mypy stubs, plugins, and types - Full tutorial about testing mypy types.
• python/typing - Official typing gitter chat.
• awesome-pythonstars100k - Curated list of awesome Python frameworks, libraries, software and resources.
• python-typecheckersstars44 - List of Python type checkers: static and runtime.
